all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Who is like unto thee, O Lord, among the gods? who is like thee, glorious in holiness, fearful in praises, doing wonders?
Exodus 15:11
Quote of the Day
"To those of you who are new or returning to the faith, there are challenges you may face. Be patient with yourself."
Elder Quentin L. Cook | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
